name: atlassianUserInfo
description: Retrieve details about the currently authenticated Atlassian user (e.g. accountId). Use for user context or attribution.

name: getAccessibleAtlassianResources
description: Resolve available Atlassian sites and their cloudIds (i.e. the url). Use when cloudId is unknown or a hostname-based guess fails.

name: getConfluencePage
description: Fetch a Confluence page or blog post by ID including full content. Use when you already know the page ID.

name: searchConfluenceUsingCql
description: Search Confluence content using CQL queries. Use for structured or advanced filtering; otherwise prefer general search tools.

name: getConfluenceSpaces
description: List available Confluence spaces. Use to discover or validate space keys before further queries.

name: getPagesInConfluenceSpace
description: List pages or blog posts within a specific Confluence space. Use when navigating space contents.

name: getConfluencePageFooterComments
description: Retrieve footer-level comments for a Confluence page or blog post.

name: getConfluencePageInlineComments
description: Retrieve inline comments attached to specific text in a Confluence page.

name: getConfluenceCommentChildren
description: Fetch replies (child comments) for a given Confluence comment.

name: getConfluencePageDescendants
description: List all child pages under a given Confluence page (hierarchical navigation).

name: createConfluencePage
description: Create a new Confluence page or blog post within a space.

name: updateConfluencePage
description: Update the content or metadata of an existing Confluence page or blog post.

name: createConfluenceFooterComment
description: Add a footer comment to a Confluence page or blog post.

name: createConfluenceInlineComment
description: Add an inline comment to a specific text range in a Confluence page.

name: getJiraIssue
description: Retrieve full details of a Jira issue by key or ID. Use when you already know the issue identifier.

name: editJiraIssue
description: Modify fields of an existing Jira issue (e.g. summary, description, assignee).

name: createJiraIssue
description: Create a new Jira issue in a project. Requires project and issue type.

name: getTransitionsForJiraIssue
description: List valid status transitions for a Jira issue. Use before changing issue status.

name: getJiraIssueRemoteIssueLinks
description: Retrieve external or linked resources associated with a Jira issue.

name: getVisibleJiraProjects
description: List Jira projects accessible to the user. Use for discovery or validation.

name: getJiraProjectIssueTypesMetadata
description: Retrieve available issue types for a given Jira project.

name: getJiraIssueTypeMetaWithFields
description: Get required and optional fields for a specific Jira issue type (used before issue creation).

name: addCommentToJiraIssue
description: Add a comment to a Jira issue.

name: transitionJiraIssue
description: Change the workflow status of a Jira issue using a valid transition.

name: searchJiraIssuesUsingJql
description: Search Jira issues using JQL queries. Use for structured filtering; otherwise prefer general search.

name: lookupJiraAccountId
description: Resolve user identifiers (accountId) from names or emails for Jira operations.

name: addWorklogToJiraIssue
description: Create or update a worklog entry on a Jira issue (time tracking).

name: getIssueLinkTypes
description: List available Jira issue link types (e.g. blocks, duplicates). Use before creating links.

name: createIssueLink
description: Create a relationship between two Jira issues (e.g. blocks, relates). Requires correct direction.

name: getJsmOpsAlerts
description: Retrieve or search Jira Service Management alerts by ID, alias, or query filters.

name: updateJsmOpsAlert
description: Perform actions on alerts (acknowledge, close, escalate). Use for incident management workflows.

name: getJsmOpsScheduleInfo
description: Retrieve schedules or on-call responder information in Jira Ops.

name: getJsmOpsTeamInfo
description: Retrieve team data or escalation policies in Jira Ops.

name: searchAtlassian
description: Default search across Jira and Confluence using natural language (Rovo Search). Use this for any searches unless CQL/JQL is explicitly required.

name: fetchAtlassian
description: Retrieve a Jira issue or Confluence page by ARI. Use ONLY when an ARI identifier is provided.

name: bitbucketWorkspace
description: List or retrieve Bitbucket workspaces.

name: bitbucketRepository
description: List or retrieve Bitbucket repositories within a workspace.

name: bitbucketPullRequest
description: Manage pull requests (create, view, merge, approve, comment) in Bitbucket.

name: bitbucketRepoContent
description: Access repository content (branches, commits, files) in Bitbucket.

name: bitbucketPipeline
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines (list, run, inspect steps and logs) in Bitbucket.

name: bitbucketDeployment
description: Retrieve deployment information in Bitbucket.

name: bitbucketEnvironment
description: Manage deployment environments (list, create, update, delete) in Bitbucket.

name: bitbucketUser
description: Retrieve user-related pull request activity across Bitbucket repositories.

name: getTeamworkGraphContext
description: Fetch a graph of related entities (issues, pages, users, PRs, etc.). Use for discovering relationships and context before deep inspection.

name: getTeamworkGraphObject
description: Retrieve full details of specific entities using ARIs from Teamwork Graph results.
